case_title: RIBAY, JR., LEON et al vs. SIMMONS, MARTHA J. et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT SIMMONS, MARTHA J.

DEPT 7/JUDGE TOMAR MASON/REPORTER:M.NORMAN/CLERK:G.SHULL. C/C FOR COURT ORDERED HEARING RE CORRECTION/ABATEMENT OF NUISANCE AND REVIEW OF JUDGMENT. PLTFS ESTELITA RIBAY AND LEON RIBAY ARE PRESENT IN PRO-PER. DEFT MARTHA SIMMONS, IN PRO-PER, DOES NOT APPEAR. SEE FILE FOR COURT ORDERS.
LETTER DATED 1/18/96 FROM DEPT OF PUBLIC HEALTH BUREAU OF ENVIRONMENTAL HEALTH SERVICES IN RESPONSE TO DEFT MARTHA SIMMONS WITH COPY TO COURT FILED.
ORDER FOR WITHDRAWAL AND RECEIPT FOR EXHIBITS FILED BY PLAINTIFF RIBAY, JR., LEON
PHOTOCOPY FOR PLAINTIFF RIBAY, JR., LEON
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF RIBAY, JR., LEON RIBAY, ESTELITA COURT TRIAL SET FOR DEC-07-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 07 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
TRIAL ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 07

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT SIMMONS, MARTHA J. DUE TO HABITABILITY BREACH, MONTHLY RENT FOR PREMISES OF 643 OAK ST #1 WILL BE REDUCED TO $200/MONTH UNTIL REPAIRS MADE TO SATISF OF DEPT OF HEALTH. IF DFT DOES NOT PAY $200 TO PLT ON/BEFORE 12/15/95, JUDGMT WILL BE FOR PLTF FOR RESTITN & POSS & R&D OF $533 PLUS COSTS. SEE JUDGMNT FOR DETAILS.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
COURT ORDERS HEARING SET FOR 1-22-96 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT 7 TO REVIEW STATUS OF CASE. NOTICE SENT TO ALL PARTIES WITH CLERK'S CERTIFICATION OF SERVICE BY MAIL.

ORDER FILED GRANTING DEFT MARTHA SIMMON'S REQUEST TO REOPEN OR CONTINUE HEARING OF 1-22-96; RESCINDING ALL ORDERS MADE BY THE COURT ON 1-22-96 AND ORDERING ALL PARTIES TO APPEAR AT IN DEPT 7 ON 2-5-96 AT 9:30AM.
ORDER FOR WITHDRAWAL AND RECEIPT FOR EXHIBITS FILED BY DEFENDANT SIMMONS, MARTHA J.
DECLARATION OF LEON RIBAY JR. FILED BY PLAINTIFF RIBAY, JR., LEON
NOTICE OF DESTRUCTION OF DOCUMENTS
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF IN PRO PER FILED BY PLAINTIFF RIBAY, JR., LEON
ORDER FOR WITHDRAWAL AND RECEIPT FOR EXHIBITS FILED BY DEFENDANT SIMMONS, MARTHA J.
PHOTOCOPY FOR PLAINTIFF RIBAY, JR., LEON

DEPT 7/JUDGE TOMAR MASON/REPORTER:M.NORMAN/CLERK:G.SHULL. HRG RE NUISANCE ABATEMENT/CORRECTION BY PLTF: PLTFS LEON AND ESTELITA RIBAY PRESENT IN PRO-PER. DEFT MARTHA SIMMONS PRESENT IN PRO-PER. COURT HEARS TESTIMONY. COURT'S RULLING UNDER ADVISEMENT.
NOTICE OF DESTRUCTION OF DOCUMENTS
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RIBAY, JR., LEON RIBAY, ESTELITA AS TO DEFENDANT SIMMONS, MARTHA J. DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED
LETTER STATING REASON FOR ABSENCE AT 1/22/96 HEARING AND FURTHER DOCUMENTATION RE ABATEMENT FILED BY DEFT MARTHA SIMMONS.
NO RESPONSE TO NOTICE; EXHIBITS AND DEPOSITIONS ORDERED DESTROYED

DEPT 7/JUDGE TOMAR MASON/REPORTER:LESLIE GARBER/CLERK:G. SHULL. C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. PLTFS LEON RIBAY AND ESTELITA RIBAY PRESENT IN PRO-PER. DEFT MARTHA SIMMONS PRESENT IN PRO PER. OPENING STATEMENTS BY BOTH SIDES. ORAL AND DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE PRESENTED. REBUTTAL TESTIMONY PRESENTED BY BOTH SIDES. BRIEF FINAL ARGUMENT BY BOTH SIDES. CASE STANDS SUBMITTED. ADMITTED EXHIBITS RETAINED BY COURT.
DECLARATION RE: RENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF RIBAY, JR., LEON RIBAY, ESTELITA
FAX RECEIVED BY COURT FROM DEFENDANT SIMMONS STATING THAT PLTF REFUSED TO ACCEPT REDUCED RENT AS PER COURT ORDERED JUDGMENT AND AGAIN SERVED DEFT WITH 3 DAY NOTICE. FAX FILED.
STATEMENT OF EVIDENCE FILED BY DEFENDANT MARTHA SIMMONS.

COURT'S ORDER DENYING PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR FINDING THAT NUISANCE HAS BEEN ABATED AND REINSTATEMENT OF ORIGINAL RENT FILED AND COPIES MAILED TO ALL PARTIES WITH CLERK'S CERTIFICATION OF SERVICE BY MAIL.
